name: SurgeVR Arena & Golf Lounge
about: Surge VR Arena and Golf Lounge of Carmichael is an entertainment venue that combines virtual reality gaming with golf and other sports simulators. It offers a relaxed atmosphere where visitors can play virtual reality games, use golf simulators, and socialize. The venue is equipped for various events, including birthday parties, corporate gatherings, and group outings, with amenities like wireless internet and the option for outside catering. They provide a range of party packages and mobile simulator rentals for off-site events.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines the thrill of virtual reality gaming with precision golf simulators
Offers a comfortable lounge area to unwind and socialize
Provides a state-of-the-art entertainment experience with a variety of immersive games
Well-equipped venue for hosting a variety of parties and events

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available.
No information on alcohol service available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether you need to bring your own clubs, but they do offer golf simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The option for outside catering is available, but it is unclear if guests can bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide information on the time it takes to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Surge VR Arena and Golf Lounge is kid-friendly and offers packages for birthday parties and events.
